summary: Frontend refactoring testing complete - IngredientsTab.jsx component extraction successful. All functionality working correctly after extracting Insumos tab from monolithic InventoryManager.js (~3873 lines reduced to ~3191 lines).

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: IngredientsTab component renders correctly with data-testid='ingredients-tab'
Ingredients list displays with all items (Ron Brugal, Limón Verde, Azúcar Blanca, etc.)
'Nuevo Insumo' button opens dialog for creating ingredients
Ingredient dialog shows all fields: name, unit, category, conversion factor, stock, cost, sub-recipe toggle, supplier
Create ingredient - Creates new ingredient successfully
Delete ingredient - Deletes ingredient with confirmation dialog
Search filter - Filtering with 'Ron' shows only matching ingredients
Category filter - Filtering by 'Carnes' shows Carne de Res and Pollo Entero
'Gestionar Unidades' button shows/hides custom units panel
Custom units panel shows system units and custom units (SACO, TEST_Edit_Unit)
'Nueva Unidad' button opens unit creation dialog
AssistantTab component still works after refactoring
AssistantTab shows Sugerencias, Alertas Precio, and Márgenes views
All other tabs functional: Producción, Almacenes, Proveedores, Recetas, Stock, Compras, Valorización, Auditoría
Sub-receta badge displays correctly on 'Salsa Criolla' with 'Producir' button
Stock bajo badges display correctly on low-stock items
action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components to fix accessibility warnings
critical_code_review_comments: IngredientsTab.jsx properly extracts all ingredient-related state and handlers from parent
Props interface is clean: ingredients, suppliers, customUnits, getTotalStock, onRefreshAll, onOpenProduction, onLoadConversionAnalysis
Constants properly imported from '../constants' - good separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes properly maintained for testing
Component uses proper React patterns (useState, useCallback)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring verified - IngredientsTab.jsx successfully extracted from InventoryManager.js. The component handles all ingredient CRUD operations, search/filter, and custom units management. AssistantTab.jsx was previously extracted. All 10 tabs in the inventory page are functional. Parent component properly passes required props and callbacks to child components.

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
